title: lobelia cardinalis var. texensis
intro: Lobelia cardinalis var. texensis, also known as the Texas Cardinal Flower, is a perennial plant species in the Lobeliaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to the southern United States and is known for its vibrant red flowers that attract pollinators and hummingbirds. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Texas Cardinal Flower can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
